title: Write test helpers for Oban.Testing with_testing_mode
prompt: Write a shared test helper `MyApp.ObanTestHelpers` with two functions: (1) `with_inline/1` — takes a function and runs it with `Oban.Testing.with_testing_mode/2` set to `:inline` (jobs execute synchronously, bypassing the database). (2) `with_manual/1` — runs the function with `:manual` mode. Document in `@moduledoc` that `with_testing_mode/2` allows per-test overrides of the global config (useful when most tests want `:manual` but a few integration tests need `:inline`). Also include a convenience function `inline_drain/1` that wraps `with_inline/1` around `Oban.drain_queue/2` for a given queue. Write to `test/support/oban_test_helpers.ex`.
tier_rationale: Introduces the less-documented `with_testing_mode/2` helper. Tests that the author reaches for the right scoping primitive.
